title: Market Buy vs. Sell Balance
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TotalSale), 0) AS totalSales FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TotalCost), 0) AS totalCost FROM MarketBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {totalSales} Cr earned through sales vs. cost to acquire during the report period. This ratio cuts straight to the bottom line of your trading activity — if expenditure exceeds revenue, either market prices moved against you, you were deliberately stockpiling for a future run, or a route selection needs rethinking.
details.help: totalSales from MarketSell vs. totalCost subquery from MarketBuy. totalSales drives the title as the gross revenue headline.

tagLines: Market buy vs. sell financial balance compiled. Trade account net position calculated for the report period.
Every buy is a bet. Every sell is the verdict. The balance shows whether the bet paid off.
If you sold more than you spent, you made money. If not, something changed that your route didn't account for.
